reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and addresses the necessary functionality. However, it would be beneficial to add a comment explaining why this function is needed and how it interacts with other parts of the io_uring code.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_uring_is_kmbuf_ring(), which checks if a kernel-managed buffer ring is present at the specified buffer group. This preparatory patch is part of an upcoming fuse kernel-managed buffer support, ensuring that the registered buffer ring by the server is a kernel-managed buffer ring.
